hero.title: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
hero.description: We believe in fixed-price contracts and upfront honesty. You will always know exactly what your software will cost before we write a single line of code.

pricing_tiers.title: Project Baselines
pricing_tiers.description: Every project is unique, but here is what you can generally expect based on scope and complexity.

tiers.name: Custom MVPs (Startups & MSMEs)
tiers.description: Perfect for custom software, rapid prototyping, and digitizing core business workflows. (Looking for a simple business website? See our ₹15K-₹50K MSME Starter Bundles).

tiers.name: SMB & Growth
tiers.description: For scaling businesses requiring multi-platform solutions and system integrations.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: Custom engineering for high-compliance, high-volume, or highly complex requirements.

engagement_models.title: How We Work With You

models.title: Fixed-Price (Project Based)
models.description: The safest way to build software. We define the exact scope, deliverable, and timeline upfront. We charge a fixed price with an advance payment to commence work. Larger projects are broken into clear, outcome-based payment milestones.
models.best_for: Projects with a clearly defined scope and strict budgets.

models.title: Dedicated Team (Retainer)
models.description: Hire our engineers, designers, or product managers on a monthly retainer. You get flexible capacity without the overhead of full-time hiring, allowing you to pivot priorities sprint-by-sprint.
models.best_for: Ongoing product development, maintenance, and evolving scopes.

models.title: Fixed Scope
models.description: Defined project, defined price. Best for clear, bounded requirements. We scope the work upfront and deliver against a fixed timeline.

models.title: Ongoing Partner
models.description: Retained/dedicated ongoing work. Best for evolving requirements, continuous delivery, and long-term support for your platform.

models.title: App Store Ready-Made
models.description: Pre-scoped vertical apps ready for customization. Fixed pricing tiers. Own your app outright with delivery in 5-7 business days.

engagement_models.description: We offer clear, transparent engagement models designed to align with your project's maturity, scope, and ongoing needs.

questions.q: Why do you require an advance payment?
questions.a: An advance payment confirms your commitment and funds the initial intensive architecture, design, and environment setup required to kick off a project successfully. It protects both parties and ensures we can allocate our best resources immediately.

questions.q: What happens if the scope changes mid-project?
questions.a: Under a fixed-price contract, any changes to the agreed scope are quoted as separate change requests. If you anticipate frequent changes, our Dedicated Team retainer model is usually a better fit.
Yes. We typically quote an annual maintenance contract at 20% of the initial project cost, which covers OS/platform updates, security patches, and minor bug fixes.
You do. Upon final payment, we explicitly assign full IP and copyright of the source code to you. There are no hidden licensing fees or ransom clauses.

cta.title: Ready to scope your project?
cta.description: Book a free 30-minute consultation. We'll discuss your requirements and give you a preliminary cost estimate on the call.
